evals.expected_output: Review identifies: (1) use of $(document).ready() instead of Drupal.behaviors, (2) missing once() call which will cause duplicate event listeners after AJAX, (3) missing core/drupal and core/once and core/jquery dependencies in libraries.yml. Should provide corrected versions of both files.

Review identifies: (1) |raw on author_name is dangerous — user display names are user-supplied input; (2) content.body and tags rendered without using content|without — breaks cache metadata bubbling; (3) preprocess uses $variables not typed as array &$variables with type hint; (4) missing cache metadata for author and tag data in preprocess. Corrected versions should use Twig auto-escaping, add cache metadata, and use content|without.

evals.prompt:
I'm building a Single Directory Component for a hero banner. Here's what I have so far: ```yaml # components/hero-banner/hero-banner.component.yml name: "Hero Banner" status: "stable" props: type: object properties: heading: type: string subheading: type: string background_image: type: string cta_label: type: string cta_url: type: string ``` ```twig {# components/hero-banner/hero-banner.html.twig #}

{{ heading }}

{{ subheading }}

{{ cta_label }}
``` And it's used like this: ```twig {{ include('mytheme:hero-banner', { 'heading': node.title.value, 'subheading': node.field_subheading.value, 'background_image': file_url(node.field_hero_image.entity.uri.value), 'cta_label': 'Learn More', 'cta_url': node.field_cta_url.value }, with_context = false) }} ```
evals.expected_output: Review identifies: (1) inline style with background_image URL is an XSS vector if URL comes from user input — should validate or use data-attribute + JS; (2) hardcoded h1 is problematic — only one h1 per page, should be configurable heading level; (3) missing attributes variable in component template; (4) missing required fields in schema; (5) cta_url should be passed through url validation; (6) missing alt text for the background image (accessibility — decorative background images should have an accessible text alternative for the content area). Corrected SDC should use {{ attributes }}, proper schema, and safe URL handling.

Review identifies Twig-specific issues: (1) iterating content.field_items['#items'] directly bypasses the render system — should use content.field_items or items variable from preprocess; (2) null-unsafe chaining on item.entity.field_image.entity.uri.value — entity reference can be null; (3) body.value|striptags is unsafe — body.value is raw HTML, striptags doesn't sanitize properly for display; (4) hardcoded /node/{{ id() }} URL — should use path() Twig function; (5) empty alt on img is acceptable for decorative images but suspicious here since image seems content-relevant. Corrected template should use safe patterns for each.
